title: Phlebotomists
description: Draw blood for tests, transfusions, donations, or research. May explain the procedure to patients and assist in the recovery of patients with adverse reactions.

tasks.text: Dispose of contaminated sharps, in accordance with applicable laws, standards, and policies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Organize or clean blood-drawing trays, ensuring that all instruments are sterile and all needles, syringes, or related items are of first-time use.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Draw blood from veins by vacuum tube, syringe, or butterfly venipuncture methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Match laboratory requisition forms to specimen tubes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dispose of blood or other biohazard fluids or tissue, in accordance with applicable laws, standards, or policies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct standards tests, such as blood alcohol, blood culture, oral glucose tolerance, glucose screening, blood smears, or peak and trough drug levels tests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect specimens at specific time intervals for tests, such as those assessing therapeutic drug levels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Process blood or other fluid samples for further analysis by other medical professionals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide sample analysis results to physicians to assist diagnosis.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Enter patient, specimen, insurance, or billing information into computer.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Document route of specimens from collection to laboratory analysis and diagnosis.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Draw blood from capillaries by dermal puncture, such as heel or finger stick methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct hemoglobin tests to ensure donor iron levels are normal.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transport specimens or fluid samples from collection sites to laboratories.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect fluid or tissue samples, using appropriate collection procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Explain fluid or tissue collection procedures to patients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train other medical personnel in phlebotomy or laboratory techniques.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Administer subcutaneous or intramuscular injects, in accordance with licensing restrictions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Draw blood from arteries, using arterial collection techniques.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor blood or plasma donors during and after procedures to ensure health, safety, and comfort.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Determine donor suitability, according to interview results, vital signs, and medical history.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Calibrate or maintain machines, such as those used for plasma collection.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve refreshments to donors to ensure absorption of sugar into their systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
